message:
Add C++ plugin with clangd LSP integration

Introduce a new plugin for C++ development featuring:
- clangd language server for code intelligence
- Reference .clang-format and .clang-tidy configurations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "name": "cpp",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "description": "C++ language support, tooling, and coding conventions",
+  "author": {
+    "name": "Tenzir",
+    "email": "engineering@tenzir.com",
+    "url": "https://github.com/tenzir"
+  },
+  "homepage": "https://github.com/tenzir/claude-plugins",
+  "repository": "https://github.com/tenzir/claude-plugins",
+  "license": "Apache-2.0",
+  "lspServers": {
+    "cpp": {
+      "command": "clangd",
+      "args": [
+        "--header-insertion=iwyu",
+        "--clang-tidy",
+        "--all-scopes-completion",
+        "--completion-style=detailed"
+      ],
+      "extensionToLanguage": {
+        ".cpp": "cpp",
+        ".cc": "cpp",
+        ".cxx": "cpp",
+        ".c++": "cpp",
+        ".c": "cpp",
+        ".h": "cpp",
+        ".hpp": "cpp",
+        ".hxx": "cpp",
+        ".h++": "cpp"
+      },
+      "startupTimeout": 5000,
+      "restartOnCrash": true
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# C++
+
+C++ language support, tooling, and coding conventions for Claude Code.
+
+## ✨ Features
+
+- 🔍 **LSP Integration**: Code intelligence via clangd (go-to-definition,
+  find-references, hover, diagnostics)
+- 📝 **Coding Conventions**: Style guidelines for C++ development (planned)
+
+## 📦 Installation
+
+```
+/plugin install cpp@tenzir
+```
+
+## ⚙️ How it works
+
+When you open a C++ file, Claude Code starts the clangd language server. This
+provides code intelligence features like go-to-definition, find-references, and
+hover information.
+
+## 🔗 Related Plugins
+
+- **formatter@tenzir**: Auto-formats C++ files with `clang-format` on
+  Write/Edit operations

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+id: cpp
+name: C++ Plugin
+description: C++ language support, tooling, and coding conventions.

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: C++ plugin with clangd language server integration
+type: feature
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2025-12-21T07:01:56.481984Z
+---
+
+Adds a new plugin for C++ development with clangd as the language server. The plugin provides go-to-definition, find-references, hover information, and diagnostics.
